_comment: MCP servers available to Cody from inside this demo workspace. Distinct from .claude/settings.json (which must stay vanilla per verify_vanilla_settings). The Ghost server is the only entry by default — it gives Cody on-demand, ephemeral Postgres databases for demos that need them (pgvector, TimescaleDB hypertables, PostGIS, JSONB, etc.). See ../../../docs/operations/demo_workspace_provisioning.md §Ephemeral databases for the cleanup obligation.
